data.description:
An announcement from BOCOM International Holdings Co. Ltd. ( (HK:3329) ) is now available.

BOCOM International Holdings Co. Ltd. has announced a revision in its annual cap for securities brokerage settlement and subscription of new shares, increasing it to HK$80.5 million for the year ending December 31, 2025. data.description:
The latest update is out from Hong Kong Education (Int’l) Investments Ltd ( (HK:1082) ).

Bradaverse Education (Int’l) Investments Group Limited has issued a profit warning, expecting a significant increase in losses for the year ended June 30, 2025, compared to the previous year. Despite these challenges, the company maintains stable operations and continues to pursue growth opportunities.

data.title: MedSci Secures Major Real-World Study Project in Gout Management
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from MedSci Healthcare Holdings Limited ( (HK:2415) ).

MedSci Healthcare Holdings Limited announced that its subsidiary, Shanghai MedSci MedTech Co., Ltd., has successfully secured a project to conduct a large-scale real-world study for a Chinese pharmaceutical company. This development underscores MedSci’s strategic positioning in the healthcare sector, showcasing its capability to deliver impactful digital healthcare solutions and strengthening its ties with pharmaceutical partners.
